bead.title: FIX-02: author tests/workflows/fixtures/recipe-app/baseline/ pre-staged artifacts
bead.description:
<context-digest>
<principles>Design for Change · Design for Simplicity · Validate Your Work · Make Intent Explicit · Prefer Reversible Decisions</principles>
<concerns>workflow-coverage | shared-fixture | runtime-parity | refusal-hardening</concerns>
<practices>tests/workflows/fixtures/recipe-app/ is the single shared fixture across all 5 runtimes · Pass criteria are runtime-neutral; per-runtime variants vary by invocation/observability only · Static checks free, functional checks gated by TEST_FUNCTIONAL=1 · Genie scenarios may emit `genie:catalog-unreachable` skip until helix-96f7dd34 resolves · Symlink/inherit from tests/install/<runtime>/install.sh where reusable</practices>
<governing>FEAT-014 FIX-02 · TP-014 §4 fixture spec · workflows/activities/<*>/artifacts/<type>/template.md</governing>
</context-digest>

Pre-stage the artifact files scenarios 3+ depend on so each scenario doesn't have to re-run scenario 1 + 2 (LLM cost):
- `baseline/docs/helix/00-discover/product-vision.md`
- `baseline/docs/helix/01-frame/prd.md`
- `baseline/docs/helix/01-frame/features/FEAT-recipe-share.md`
- `baseline/docs/helix/02-design/adr/ADR-001-sqlite.md`
- `baseline/docs/helix/02-design/technical-designs/TD-recipe-store.md`

Each artifact authored against its template under workflows/activities/, with ddx: frontmatter (`id`, `depends_on`, `status: draft`). Content should be terse but template-conformant so verify-sections passes.
bead.acceptance: All five files exist; each parses as YAML frontmatter + Markdown; verify-sections.sh and verify-frontmatter.sh both exit 0 against the matching expectations files (once those land in FIX-03).
